subagent_steps.name: research
subagent_steps.prompt: Research best practices and patterns for the requested feature

subagent_steps.name: design
subagent_steps.prompt: Design the system architecture and API based on research findings

subagent_steps.name: implement
subagent_steps.prompt: Implement the feature based on the design output

subagent_steps.name: test
subagent_steps.prompt: Write tests and run security audit on the implementation

subagent_steps.name: docs
subagent_steps.prompt: Generate code documentation and project documentation

combos.name: subagent-security-audit
combos.description: Parallel security audit with multiple subagents

subagent_steps.name: vuln-scan
subagent_steps.prompt: Run vulnerability scan on the codebase

subagent_steps.name: report
subagent_steps.prompt: Compile security audit findings into a human-readable report
